HeroSection.title: Building modern web products
HeroSection.description: I’m Dai An — a full‑stack developer focused on performance, clean architecture, and approachable UI/UX. I turn requirements into reliable features that ship.

AboutSection.title: About Me
AboutSection.description: I build web applications end‑to‑end — from UI to APIs. I care about readable code, maintainable systems, and shipping features that feel great to use.
